ddls:
CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper or poster */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the submission */,
  "working_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the working group associated with the submission */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference where the submission is made */,
  "paper_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., Paper, Poster) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_working_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("working_group_id") REFERENCES working_groups ("working_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., institution) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_groups" (
  "working_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the working group (e.g., Metals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the working group */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the working group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("working_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the conference */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the conference is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Score given to the submission */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentation_schedule" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation scheduled */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being presented */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot for the presentation */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room where the presentation will take place */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date of the presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentation_schedule_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., Student, Professional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring organization */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance log entry */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation attended */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Attended, No Show) */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES presentation_schedule ("presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the attendee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee making the payment */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor making the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Registration, Sponsorship) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program entry */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "program_date" TEXT /* Date of the program */,
  "program_time" TEXT /* Time of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_presenters" (
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presenter */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "presenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the presenter */,
  "presenter_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the presenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_presenters_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES conference_program ("program_id")
)
